name: Ollama + Claude CLI
description: Minimal devcontainer for Claude CLI with a pre-configured Ollama backend, privacy defaults, container firewall, and persistent settings. Includes Node.js and GitHub CLI. Requires Ollama to be running on the host.

imageVariant.description: Ubuntu version (use ubuntu-22.04 or ubuntu-18.04 on local arm64/Apple Silicon):

modelMap.description: Comma-separated model overrides in role:model format. Common Ollama defaults are preconfigured; override if your host has different models.
